title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Discuss the options with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two are the most important.

content.task: Discuss the following actions that individuals could take to help protect the environment, then decide which two would have the greatest positive impact.

script.text: Now, I'd like you to talk about something together for about two minutes. Here are some actions that individuals could take to help protect the environment.
Now decide which two individual actions would have the greatest positive impact on the environment.
